svg.title: HelixTerminator — Kubernetes Deployment
svg.desc: Draw.io architecture diagram. Open in diagrams.net or draw.io desktop for interactive view. File: 04_kubernetes_deployment.drawio

metadata.drawio-source:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <mxfile host="diagrams.net" modified="2026-06-28T00:00:00.000Z" agent="HelixTerminator Spec" version="21.0.0" type="device"> <diagram name="Kubernetes Deployment" id="k8s-deploy-004"> <mxGraphModel dx="1800" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2200" pageHeight="1700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="HelixTerminator — Kubernetes Cluster Deployment" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="20" width="1400" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== EXTERNAL TRAFFIC ===== --> <mxCell id="internet" value="Internet / Users" style="shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="60" width="200" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== LOAD BALANCER ===== --> <mxCell id="lb" value="Cloud Load Balancer
(AWS ALB / GCP LB)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="170" width="260" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-inet-lb" value="" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1000" y="140" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="1000" y="140" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="1000" y="170" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== KUBERNETES CLUSTER BORDER ===== --> <mxCell id="k8s-cluster" value="Kubernetes Cluster (v1.30)" style="swimlane;startSize=35;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;arcSize=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="250" width="2060" height="1350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== MASTER NODE ===== --> <mxCell id="master-node" value="Master Node (Control Plane)" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="50" width="1100" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-server" value="kube-apiserver" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="etcd" value="etcd
(cluster state)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="40" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scheduler" value="kube-scheduler" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="45" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctrl-mgr" value="controller-manager" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="45" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloud-ctrl" value="cloud-controller" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="45" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="coredns" value="CoreDNS" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="master-node"> <mxGeometry x="810" y="45" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Ingress Controller --> <mxCell id="ingress-ctrl" value="Ingress Controller (Nginx)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="1200" y="65" width="220" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== NAMESPACE: helixterm-prod ===== --> <mxCell id="ns-prod" value="namespace: helixterm-prod" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="220" width="1980" height="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- API Gateway Pod --> <mxCell id="pod-apigw" value="api-gateway
(3 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-auth" value="auth-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-identity" value="identity-provider
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-pki" value="pki-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-rbac" value="rbac-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-sshproxy" value="ssh-proxy
(5 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="770" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-session" value="session-manager
(3 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-terminal" value="terminal-service
(5 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1070" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-vault" value="vault-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1220" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-secrets" value="secrets-manager
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1370" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Row 2 in prod --> <mxCell id="pod-user" value="user-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-org" value="org-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-host" value="host-registry
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-audit" value="audit-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-notif" value="notification-svc
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-billing" value="billing-service
(1 replica)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="770" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-search" value="search-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-config" value="config-service
(2 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1070" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-portfwd" value="port-fwd-service
(3 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1220" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-keyrot" value="key-rotation
(1 replica)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1370" y="170" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-ratelim" value="rate-limiter
(3 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1530" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-wsgw" value="websocket-gw
(3 replicas)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1680" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod-hsm" value="hsm-interface
(1 replica)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-prod"> <mxGeometry x="1830" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== NAMESPACE: helixterm-staging ===== --> <mxCell id="ns-staging" value="namespace: helixterm-staging" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="570" width="900" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg-note" value="Mirror of prod namespace
(1 replica per service)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="ns-staging"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="200" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg-api" value="api-gateway (1)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-staging"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="50" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg-core" value="core services (1 ea)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-staging"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="50" width="150" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg-db" value="staging databases" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-staging"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="45" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg-ci" value="CI/CD Pipelines
(GitHub Actions)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-staging"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="50" width="150" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== NAMESPACE: monitoring ===== --> <mxCell id="ns-monitoring" value="namespace: monitoring" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="750" width="1200" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prometheus" value="Prometheus
(metrics)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="48" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="grafana" value="Grafana
(dashboards)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jaeger" value="Jaeger
(tracing)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alertmanager" value="AlertManager" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loki" value="Loki
(log aggregation)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="630" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kibana" value="Kibana
(log UI)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="node-exporter" value="node-exporter
(DaemonSet)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="930" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kube-state" value="kube-state-metrics" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-monitoring"> <mxGeometry x="1070" y="50" width="110" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== NAMESPACE: helixterm-system ===== --> <mxCell id="ns-system" value="namespace: helixterm-system" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="940" width="1500" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="istio" value="Istio Service Mesh
(istiod)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="spire-server" value="SPIRE Server
(workload identity)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="50" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cert-manager" value="cert-manager
(TLS automation)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="50" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vault-agent" value="Vault Agent
Injector" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="530" y="50" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="external-secrets" value="External Secrets
Operator" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="50" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="argo-cd" value="ArgoCD
(GitOps)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="karpenter" value="Karpenter
(auto-scaling)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="1020" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="keda" value="KEDA
(event scaling)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="1170" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="velero" value="Velero
(backup)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-system"> <mxGeometry x="1320" y="50" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== DATA NAMESPACE ===== --> <mxCell id="ns-data" value="namespace: helixterm-data" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="1130" width="1200" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg-primary" value="PostgreSQL Primary
(StatefulSet)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg-replica" value="PostgreSQL Replica
(StatefulSet x2)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis-cluster" value="Redis Cluster
(StatefulSet x3)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kafka-brokers" value="Kafka Brokers
(StatefulSet x3)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="530" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rabbitmq-cluster" value="RabbitMQ Cluster
(StatefulSet x3)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="elastic-cluster" value="Elasticsearch
(StatefulSet x3)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="45" width="150" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zookeeper" value="Zookeeper
(StatefulSet x3)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;size=8;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="ns-data"> <mxGeometry x="1040" y="45" width="140" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== WORKER NODES ===== --> <mxCell id="workers-group" value="Worker Nodes" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="k8s-cluster"> <mxGeometry x="1500" y="570" width="520" height="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker1" value="worker-node-1
(c5.4xlarge)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="40" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker2" value="worker-node-2
(c5.4xlarge)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="40" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker3" value="worker-node-3
(r5.2xlarge — DB)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="130" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker4" value="worker-node-4
(r5.2xlarge — DB)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="130" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker5" value="worker-node-5
(c5.2xlarge — SSH)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="220" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker6" value="worker-node-6
(c5.2xlarge — SSH)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="220" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-hpa" value="HPA: CPU > 70% → scale out
Min: 2, Max: 20 replicas" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=15;fillColor=#fffde7;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="310" width="470" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker-pvc" value="Persistent Volumes:
• GP3 SSD for PostgreSQL
• io2 NVMe for Redis
• Kafka retention: 7 days" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=15;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="workers-group"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="390" width="470" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Connections: LB → Ingress → prod namespace --> <mxCell id="e-lb-ingress" value="" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" source="lb" target="ingress-ctrl" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-ingress-prod" value="" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="ingress-ctrl" target="ns-prod" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
